description_long: This is a small, rectangular cabin with a flat, dark roof and a brick-patterned exterior. The front facade features a large glass storefront with four window panels and a single glass door, framed in blue, providing a clear view into the tiled interior. The side and rear walls are solid, lacking windows or doors, and are uniformly covered in a reddish-brown brick texture. The roof appears to be made of a textured, possibly tarred or shingled material, and slightly overhangs the front. The overall design is utilitarian, resembling a small urban shop or service kiosk, with minimal decorative elements. The structure is compact and robust, suitable for placement along a street or in a small commercial area.
description: A compact, brick-patterned cabin with a flat dark roof, large glass storefront windows, and a single blue-framed door on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, a single blue-framed door, and tiled flooring inside.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid brick-patterned wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted brick-patterned wall.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid brick-patterned wall, matching the left side.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with slight overhang, likely tarred or shingled
attribute_window_arrangement: Four large, rectangular glass windows arranged in a single row across the front facade, forming a symmetrical storefront pattern
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the left side of the front facade, integrated with the window arrangement
